recommendations.title: The Boxtrolls
recommendations.overview: An orphaned boy raised by underground creatures called Boxtrolls comes up from the sewers and out of his box to save his family and the town from the evil exterminator, Archibald Snatcher.

recommendations.title: Foodfight!
recommendations.overview: The evil Brand X joins a supermarket that becomes a city after closing time.

recommendations.title: The Boy, the Mole, the Fox and the Horse
recommendations.overview: The unlikely friendship of a boy, a mole, a fox and a horse traveling together in the boy's search for home.

recommendations.title: Robin Robin
recommendations.overview: A bird raised by mice begins to question where she belongs and sets off on a daring journey of self-discovery.

recommendations.title: The Ice Age Adventures of Buck Wild
recommendations.overview: The fearless one-eyed weasel Buck teams up with mischievous possum brothers Crash & Eddie as they head off on a new adventure into Buck's home: The Dinosaur World.

recommendations.title: The Land Before Time III: The Time of the Great Giving
recommendations.overview: When a sudden shortage of water threatens all life in the great valley, The gang of young dinosaur must cooperate with a group of bullies to make a risky journey outside the valley and find the cause.

recommendations.title: The Brave Little Toaster
recommendations.overview: A group of dated appliances, finding themselves stranded in a summer home that their family had just sold, decide to seek out their eight year old 'master'.

recommendations.title: Tarzan II
recommendations.overview: When one of his missteps puts his family in jeopardy, Tarzan decides they would be better off without him.

recommendations.title: The Land Before Time VIII: The Big Freeze
recommendations.overview: When the dinosaur families get trapped in a valley by an ice storm, one family of "spike tail" dinosaurs volunteers to leave since they consume more food than the others. Meanwhile, the young dinos and a new adult dinosaur named Mr. Thicknose, head o

recommendations.title: Primal: Tales of Savagery
recommendations.overview: Genndy Tartakovsky's Primal: Tales of Savagery features a caveman and a dinosaur on the brink of extinction. Bonded by tragedy, this unlikely friendship becomes the only hope of survival.
